owasp_risk: AAI008 — Agent Supply Chain and Dependency Risk
narrative: A supply-chain compromise swaps an honest dependency hop for a forged one. APS computeDelegationChainRoot content-addresses the entire chain, so swapping a hop produces a different root digest. Downstream verifiers see a different chain than the one originally signed and refuse the swapped version.

expected_outcome.verifier_assertion: computeDelegationChainRoot must produce different root digests for the two chains; downstream verifier compares against published root and rejects mismatch
